service: Base de Datos Estadisticos - SieteRestWS REST API
frequency: quarterly (built from daily TPM, monthly CPI, quarterly GDP)

units.tpm_annual_pct: TPM, percent per year (quarterly average of daily series)
units.infl_q: quarterly CPI inflation, fraction (compounded monthly variations)
units.pib_sa: real GDP, chained volume, seasonally adjusted, ref 2018 (CLP bn)
units.output_gap: HP-filter cycle of log real GDP (lambda=1600), fraction
units.real_rate_q: ex-post real quarterly rate = i_q - infl_q

transformations: TPM: daily->quarterly mean. CPI: monthly % -> quarterly compounded fraction. GDP: log + HP filter (lambda=1600) for the output gap.
note: Real official data from BCCh; credentials are not stored in this file.
output_gap_method: Unobserved-Components Kalman smoother (smooth I(2) trend + AR(2) cycle), replacing the HP filter; COVID stays in the cycle
inflation_centering: observable pi = quarterly inflation minus the 3% annual target (steady state = target; model forecasts converge to 3% by construction)
